positive: A stylized, high-contrast silhouette of a majestic, soaring eagle catching the light, wings fully spread in mid-flight against a solid, gradient sunset backdrop. The composition must be central and powerful, emphasizing the sweeping curves of the wings and the sharpness of the profile. Use a limited, vibrant color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and rich gold for maximum apparel print pop. Style should be a blend of graphic vector art and clean linework, giving it an epic, ethereal, yet punchy feel. Focus on strong negative space around the silhouette to ensure scalability and print quality. Minimalist yet dramatic.
negative: blur, low contrast, grayscale, washed out, noise, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, grain, amateur, messy background, clutter
